providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 1.7B GGUF auto prompt
args: Transcribe the audio. Return only the transcript text.
providers.notes: Larger-model auto-language control for the multilingual smoke corpus.

providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 1.7B GGUF forced sample language
args: The audio language is {language}. Transcribe the speech in {language}. Do not translate. If there is no speech, return an empty transcript. Return only the transcript text.
providers.notes: Tests whether 1.7B improves the forced-language quality seen with 0.6B.

providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 1.7B GGUF no-speech-first forced language
args: If the audio contains no spoken words, output nothing. Otherwise transcribe the {language} speech exactly. Do not repeat these instructions. Do not translate.
providers.notes: Checks whether a stricter no-speech-first prompt avoids prompt echoing on silence while preserving forced-language transcription.
